## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Motivation. Link to a related issue if applicable.

## Type

- [ ] Spec clarification (cite section)
- [ ] Validator change (Python or new port)
- [ ] Corpus addition / fix
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] If behavior changes, a corpus case (positive or negative) was added
- [ ] `python validator/python/test_corpus.py` passes
- [ ] No archetype additions (frozen at A2AL/2.0 — see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No renumbering of existing codes
- [ ] Backward-compat impact noted in the PR description if any
